title: Shortest Path
description: Interactive visualization of Dijkstra's shortest path algorithm for finding optimal routes in weighted graphs. Demonstrates how the algorithm explores nodes and updates distances to find the shortest path.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Shortest Path
Dijkstra's Algorithm
Graph Algorithms
Weighted Graphs
Routing
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of shortest path
Explore shortest path through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of shortest path to solve problems
Test understanding of shortest path through interactive exercises
